flashcards.definition: Converges light; produces real or virtual images depending on object distance.
Diverges light; always produces virtual, upright, reduced images.
Thicker in the middle; converges light to a focal point.
Thinner in the middle; diverges light away from the focal axis.
1/f = 1/d_o + 1/d_i; relates focal length, object distance, and image distance.
